title: Don't Stub Your Toe! - Fabric Port
description: A mod that enables auto jump when sprinting, even when it is disabled.
body:
A mod that enables auto jump when sprinting, even when it is disabled.

---

Did you ever think that jumping every block when sprinting was annoying. 
Well this mod fixes that.

This is a client side fabric mod.

Port of [dsyt](https://github.com/Vexatos/dont-stub-your-toe) by Vexatos
